ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Restart Obsidian. You should not get a notification, since your Inbox folder hasn't been updated externally.
ast.target: 重启 Obsidian。你不应该收到通知，因为你的收件箱文件夹没有在外部更新。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Open Obsidian. You should get a notification, because your "Inbox" folder was changed outside of Obsidian.
ast.target: 打开 Obsidian。你应该收到通知，因为你的“收件箱”文件夹在 Obsidian 外部被更改了。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Restart Obsidian. You should not get a notification, since your Inbox note hasn't been updated externally.
ast.target: 重启 Obsidian。你不应该收到通知，因为你的收件箱笔记没有在外部更新。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Open Obsidian. You should get a notification, because your "Inbox" note was changed outside of Obsidian.
ast.target: 打开 Obsidian。你应该收到通知，因为你的“收件箱”笔记在 Obsidian 外部被更改了。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Walkthrough
ast.target: 演练

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Inboxes
ast.target: 收件箱

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Looks like you haven't setup Obsidian Inbox yet! Let's get started!
ast.target: 看起来你还没有设置 Obsidian 收件箱！让我们开始吧！

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: You've completed the walkthrough!
ast.target: 你已完成演练！

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Feel free to close the walkthrough, or go back if you missed something!
		You can always re-open this walkthrough in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 你可以随时关闭演练，或者如果错过了什么可以返回！\n\t\t你可以在插件设置中随时重新打开此演练。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Alright, let's verify that this is working.
ast.target: 好的，让我们验证一下这是否有效。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Click the "Next" button below to continue.
ast.target: 点击下面的“下一步”按钮继续。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
What would you like to compare your inbox note's contents to when
		deciding whether or not to show a notification on startup?
ast.target: 在决定是否在启动时显示通知时，你希望将收件箱笔记的内容与什么进行比较？

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
'Compare to last tracked' will compare to a snapshot from when Obsidian
		was last closed. This is the default, and is most commonly used when you
		want to know if a note was changes externally outside of Obsidian.
ast.target: '与上次跟踪的比较' 将与 Obsidian 上次关闭时的快照进行比较。这是默认设置，通常用于你想知道笔记是否在 Obsidian 外部被更改的情况。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
'Compare to base' will compare to a base contents that you define. This
		is used for when you want to know if there's anything in your inbox
		note, even if there haven't been any changes to your note since your
		last startup.
ast.target: '与基准比较' 将与你定义的基准内容进行比较。这用于你想知道收件箱笔记中是否有任何内容，即使自上次启动以来笔记没有任何更改。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Would you like to be notified when changes are made to a note, or when
		new files are added to a folder?
ast.target: 你希望在笔记被更改或新文件添加到文件夹时收到通知吗？

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Select the note that you want to be notified of when it's contents
			are changed.
ast.target: 选择你希望在其内容被更改时收到通知的笔记。

ast.source: This will open a pane in the sidebar to guide you through how to use this plugin.
ast.target: 这将在侧边栏中打开一个窗格，指导您如何使用此插件。

ast.source: Inbox
ast.target: 收件箱

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: What to compare the inbox note contents to when deciding whether or not to notify. 'Compare to last tracked' will compare to a snapshot from when Obsidian was last closed. 'Compare to base' will compare to a base contents that you define.
ast.target: 决定是否通知时，将收件箱笔记内容与什么进行比较。'与上次跟踪比较'将与 Obsidian 上次关闭时的快照进行比较。'与基准比较'将与您定义的基准内容进行比较。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: If tracking note, will notify when a note's content is updated. If tracking folder, will notify when new files are added to a folder.
ast.target: 如果跟踪笔记，将在笔记内容更新时通知。如果跟踪文件夹，将在新文件添加到文件夹时通知。
